title: Compass Eligibility Receipt v1
description: Canonical schema for the off-chain receipt payload that gets hashed into CompassHub.issueReceipt's attestationDigest field. Reproducible byte-for-byte by the verify-receipt CLI for judge replication.

version.description: Schema version. 1.1.0 added required quoteCommitment field for freshness binding.

receiptId.description: Unique receipt identifier emitted on-chain. Lowercase hex.

policyHash.description: sha256 of the canonical policy JSON in docs/policies/. Lowercase hex.

agentIdCommitment.description: keccak256 of (agentTokenId || ownerAddress) — non-identifying agent-handle commitment.

verifierPubKey.description: Hex-encoded compressed enclave-born signing public key (Plan B requirement). MUST be bound into the TEE attestation REPORTDATA per Phase 6b.0.

credentialBundleHash.description: sha256 of the SD-JWT VC bundle the enclave decrypted to evaluate the policy. Allows future audit without exposing the credential itself.

expiry.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which this receipt is no longer valid. CompassHub.issueReceipt rejects receipts with expiry <= block.timestamp.

issuedAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the enclave produced the receipt. Floor-bucketed to 15-min on-chain (timestampBucket field) per threat-model section 1b.

quoteCommitment.description: sha256 of the dstack TDX quote that was current when the receipt was signed. Pins the receipt to a specific attested image instance — verifier archives quoteHex at receipt-mint time, recomputes sha256 later, asserts match. Env-mode dev receipts carry sha256('compass-env-mode-no-attestation') as a sentinel; verifiers MUST reject this value in production.

_canonicalization._note: MUST be applied identically by the issuer (enclave), the verifier (off-chain consumer), and the judge-replicable verify-receipt CLI. Any whitespace / key-order divergence breaks the digest match.

_alignmentToOnChain._note: The on-chain ReceiptIssued event in CompassHub emits a subset of these fields plus on-chain-derived ones: receiptId, policyId, nullifier, agentIdCommitment, resultHash, expiry, attestationDigest, timestampBucket. The attestationDigest emitted on-chain MUST equal sha256(canonicalize(this-receipt-document)).
